real_pypeec_bridge.interpretation: Real PyPEEC is treated as an external solver fidelity bridge. The reported gaps are field-level operator mismatch signals; this exp06 run does not calibrate on PyPEEC samples.

real_pypeec_bridge_config.notes: Read-only real-solver bridge from exp07. This reports PyPEEC field-shape gaps as an external fidelity level; it does not use PyPEEC samples for calibration or training.

fidelity_ladder_is_monotone.threshold: low decoder error < medium decoder error < high decoder error

medium_operator_gap_is_between_low_and_h.threshold: 0 < medium basis gap < high basis gap

real_pypeec_bridge_artifact_is_valid.threshold: exp07 real PyPEEC artifact exists, gates passed, and required cases completed

real_pypeec_bridge_gap_is_material_and_b.threshold: exp03-like PyPEEC shape gap is finite and between configured material/bounded limits
